title: Woodland Blossoming Grove: legacy backlog batch 13 claim opened
body: Start-right live-state check found 0 active claims and 0 active commit intents before my claim. Opened claim 8d2c0b7e for dedicated knowledge-curation batch 13 over the next five legacy backlog entries. Scope is in-place item dispositions only: no archive, split, shard, rename, move, or new buffer file.
